b3f323e4-75f0-483a-bc53-491c84113702.description_en: "TOP DANDY" has produced numerous dramas since its founding.  A distinctive circular floor.  Overhead is an oversized chandelier - Why not see for yourself why it's a "long-established store" backed by its popularity?

afed338f-7868-40ad-be93-4cac63c0db0c.description_en: "SMAPPA! HANS AXEL VON FERSEN -Smappa! Group main store-" is impressive with its gorgeous interior inspired by the Palace of Versailles and large chandeliers ♪ Many of the staff are certified sommeliers, and you can enjoy choosing drinks ☆

6411b345-486a-4b33-9715-6ecab387aede.description_en: The revolution of Kabukicho's largest brand AIR GROUP is unstoppable...  Produced by a famous designer, this super large store of 120 tsubo has an overwhelming scale that is unrivaled by any other store!The total construction cost of this gorgeous store is definitely one of the highest in the industry!!

a85b1876-f222-44c8-8d26-77c887bf731f.description_en: ACQUA Group head office ``ACQUA''.  A truly extraordinary luxury space with overwhelming scale and sophisticated design.  As soon as you step inside, the sparkling chandelier lights up and you enter a world of luxury.

65204f32-50f8-498d-b878-d2c8e15b784a.description_en: FUYUTSUKI -DeZon-, a super large store with 120 tsubo, total of 200 million yen, and 50 tables, has finally opened in Furin Kaikan with the next generation of Fuyutsuki Group on its shoulders!  !

8010632a-aca6-431f-b003-0faf9fd5120e.description_en: "Leo" is characterized by its solid stone wall staircase!  Why not enjoy a space that is a little different from your everyday life with carefully selected decorations and lighting?
